title: Linear-Time String Search and Prefix Structure · Cost-Model Clinic: Rolling Hash
summary: Scan large logs for many repeated patterns without repeated restart work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 rolling hash increment in a verified prefix-based matching engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use rolling hashes with explicit modulus, collision verification, and numeric limits.
Use prefix evidence to avoid rechecking characters in Knuth-Morris-Pratt search.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
